text.title: Architecture Health Weekly Report Template Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the report artefact this methodology produces. Validator script enforces required keys, field shapes, and forbidden patterns. Output that fails the schema is rejected.

example.note: artefact_id violates pattern; owner is empty; version not semver; required fields missing.

list.item: rationale or evidence that does not cite at least one input artefact by name
version frozen at 1.0.0 when decision content has changed
artefact_id reuses an existing id within the same store
